NCT03500549.label: Outcome
NCT03500549.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT03500549.text: After a 4-week run-in phase in which all patients received pegcetacoplan plus eculizumab, we randomly assigned patients to subcutaneous pegcetacoplan monotherapy (41 patients) or intravenous eculizumab (39 patients).

NCT04558918.label: Outcome
NCT04558918.source: The New England journal of medicine
NCT04558918.text: In the first trial, 59 of the 62 patients who received iptacopan and 14 of the 35 anti-C5-treated patients did not require or receive transfusion; in the second trial, no patients required or received transfusion.

NCT04469465.label: Outcome
NCT04469465.text: Eligible patients were adults (age ≥18 years) with PNH and clinically significant extravascular haemolysis (haemoglobin ≤9·5 g/dL; absolute reticulocyte count ≥120 × 109/L) on ravulizumab or eculizumab for at least 6 months.

NCT04434092.label: Outcome
NCT04434092.text: C5 inhibitor-naive patients with lactate dehydrogenase (LDH) ≥2 × upper limit of normal (ULN) were randomized 2:1 to crovalimab or eculizumab.
